- [ ] `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-13-workflow-hooks-harness-design.md`: Auto-integration block format completely diverged — spec shows single-line marker with absolute path; code now uses begin/end markers, local hook copies, and relative `dirname $0` paths.
  - Spec says: `# doc-superpowers: freshness gate` with absolute path to skill dir
  - Code shows: `# doc-superpowers:begin` / `# doc-superpowers:end` markers, hooks copied locally as `.doc-superpowers-<name>`, referenced via `$(dirname "$0")`

### P1 — Stale Updates

- [ ] `docs/architecture/system-overview.md`: C4 Container diagram references "SKILL.md Section 3" for Verification — now Section 2.
  - Doc says: `Container(verification, "Verification Gates", "SKILL.md Section 3")`
  - Code shows: `## 2. Verification`

- [ ] `docs/architecture/system-overview.md`: Git hook integration described as "guarded source blocks with `-f` guard" — now uses begin/end marker blocks with locally-copied hook scripts.
  - Doc says: `auto-integrates into existing hooks via guarded source blocks (with -f guard for bash 3.2 safety)`
  - Code shows: `# doc-superpowers:begin` / `end` markers, local hook copies via `sed` placeholder substitution, `dirname $0` for portability

- [ ] `docs/architecture/system-overview.md`: CI/CD Templates described as "array-join pattern" — code now uses random heredoc delimiters for secure GitHub Actions output.
  - Doc says: `Templates use array-join pattern for strict YAML parser compatibility`
  - Code shows: `delimiter="EOF_$(head -c 16 /dev/urandom | base64 | tr -dc 'a-zA-Z0-9')"` for multiline output security

- [ ] `docs/workflows/doc-superpowers.md`: Canonical Reference Files table has stale "SKILL.md Section N" parentheticals — Sections 2, 4, 5 no longer exist.
  - Doc says: `references/agent-prompt-template.md ... (SKILL.md Section 2)`
  - Code shows: Section 2 is now "Verification"; these references are in Quick Reference table, not numbered sections

- [ ] `docs/workflows/doc-superpowers.md`: Git hook integration and uninstall descriptions are stale — same begin/end markers issue as architecture doc.

- [ ] `docs/codebase-guide.md`: Code flow references "Section 3: Verification Gate" — now Section 2.

- [ ] `docs/codebase-guide.md`: Hooks install flow describes old "guarded source block with -f check" — now local copy + begin/end markers.

- [ ] `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-12-bundled-doc-tooling-design.md`: Spec says `update-index` outputs refreshed entries to stdout; code outputs to stderr.

- [ ] `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-13-workflow-hooks-harness-design.md`: Git tier uninstall description outdated — now uses begin/end marker range deletion + local hook copy cleanup.

- [ ] `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-13-workflow-hooks-harness-design.md`: CI PR comment uses `doc(s)` pluralization, spec shows `docs`.

- [ ] `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-13-workflow-hooks-harness-design.md`: Path Resolution section says only Claude tier copies hooks locally — git tier now also copies locally.

## Key Theme

The dominant staleness driver is commit `635b67a` (resolve 10 code review findings in scripts/), which introduced:
1. **Hook integration redesign**: begin/end markers, local hook copies, relative `dirname $0` paths
2. **bash 3.2 compatibility**: `mapfile -t` → `while IFS= read -r` loops
3. **CI security**: random heredoc delimiters for GitHub Actions output
4. **Test refactor**: shared `test-helpers.sh` extracted from test suites

Secondary driver is commit `d46ec45` (resolve writing-skills audit findings in SKILL.md), which renumbered SKILL.md sections from 0-7 to 0-4 and moved 3 sections to reference files.

## Execution
Run `/doc-superpowers update` to auto-apply fixes from this plan.
